common.confirmDeleteMessage: Delete “{name}”? This action cannot be undone.

contentLocale.optionalHint: optional, falls back to Spanish when empty

errors.notFoundBody: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

login.title: Sign in
login.heading: Admin access
login.subtitle: Only authorized accounts can manage the menu.
login.devBypassHint: Local only. No Supabase or Google required.

errors.unauthorized: Your account is not authorized to access the dashboard. Contact the administrator.
errors.auth_callback: Could not complete sign-in. Please try again.
errors.session_required: You must sign in to access the dashboard.
errors.generic: An error occurred while signing in.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noCategoriesYet: The menu has no categories yet.
dashboard.categoriesOrderHint: Order on the public menu. Use arrows to rearrange.
dashboard.itemsOrderHint: Items grouped by category. Reorder within each section.
dashboard.noCategoriesForItems: Create at least one category before adding items.
dashboard.orderPageDescription: Menu preview as your guests see it. Use arrows to change category and item order.
dashboard.orderPreviewHint: This is the order shown on the public menu. Changes save instantly.
dashboard.orderEmptyCategories: Add categories in the master catalog to start arranging the menu.
dashboard.dragToReorder: Drag with ⠿ or use arrows to change order.
dashboard.categoriesMasterDescription: Master category catalog. Create and edit names here; order is set under Menu order.
dashboard.itemsMasterDescription: All menu items in one place. Edit details, prices, variants, and allergens.
dashboard.allergensMasterDescription: Master allergen catalog reusable across any item.
dashboard.emptyCategory: This category has no items yet.

allergens.subtitle: Allergen list available to assign to menu items.
allergens.name: Name
allergens.emojiOptionalEmpty: No emoji — only the name will be shown.
allergens.emojiHint: Optional. Open the emoji keyboard and pick any emoji, like on your phone.
allergens.empty: No allergens in the list. Add the first one to assign them to items.

itemForm.name: Name
itemForm.basePriceHint: Used when the item has no selected variants.
itemForm.allergensHint: Mark allergens present in this item. They appear on the public menu.
itemForm.imageHint: JPG, PNG or WebP. Max 5 MB.
itemForm.variantsHint: Sizes or options with absolute price (e.g. Small / Medium).
itemForm.modifiersHint: Extras, sauces or add-on options with additional price.

errors.MODIFIER_MIN_INVALID: Minimum for group "{groupName}" must be an integer >= 0
errors.MODIFIER_MAX_INVALID: Maximum for group "{groupName}" must be >= minimum
errors.UNSUPPORTED_IMAGE_FORMAT: Unsupported image format (use JPG, PNG or WebP)
errors.ALLERGEN_ICON_REQUIRED: You must select an emoji for the allergen
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

menu.title: Menu
menu.metaDescription: Explore {restaurant}'s menu — dishes, prices and availability at a glance.
menu.subtitle: Menu
menu.emptyBody: Check back soon — we're putting something special together.
